summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GERdoctor iteration 13 features. All new functionality is working correctly: Admin Settings page, GERdoctor wordmark logo, User Dashboard redesign (desktop horizontal cards + mobile vertical accordion). Backend APIs 100% passing, frontend UI 95% working.

issues: Footer still shows 'GuidedJourney' instead of 'GERdoctor' - should use Logo component or update text

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/settings returns seeded default settings (logo_bold_part='GER', logo_light_part='doctor')
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings requires admin authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings works for admin and persists data
Backend: PUT /api/admin/settings returns 403 for regular user
Backend: All existing APIs still working (health, CMS, partners, steps, admin)
Frontend: Landing page shows GERdoctor wordmark logo (GER bold, doctor light)
Frontend: User Dashboard desktop - 8 horizontal step cards in grid layout (4 cols x 2 rows)
Frontend: User Dashboard desktop - progress bars at top of each card with animation
Frontend: User Dashboard desktop - active step highlighted with border and shadow
Frontend: User Dashboard desktop - step content area below cards with form fields
Frontend: User Dashboard mobile (390px) - vertical accordion layout with left progress line
Frontend: User Dashboard mobile - accordion expand/collapse behavior working
Frontend: User Dashboard mobile - 8 step navigation buttons visible
Frontend: User Dashboard - progress bar animation on page load (fills from 0)
Frontend: User Dashboard - form submission and save progress working (toast shown)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard - Settings tab visible and clickable
Frontend: Admin Dashboard Settings - All fields present (Site Title, Meta Description, Logo Bold/Light, Contact Email, Primary Color, Footer Text)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard Settings - Logo preview updates live as you type
Frontend: Admin Dashboard Settings - Save button calls PUT /api/admin/settings and succeeds (toast shown)
Frontend: Admin Dashboard - GERdoctor logo with ADMIN badge visible
Frontend: Partner Dashboard - GERdoctor logo with PARTNER badge visible
action_items: Update Landing.js footer to use 'GERdoctor' instead of 'GuidedJourney' (lines 340-341)
critical_code_review_comments: Footer in Landing.js still references old branding 'GuidedJourney' - should be updated to 'GERdoctor' for consistency

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features working, minor branding issue in footer)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 added: 1) Admin Settings page with site configuration (logo, colors, contact info), 2) GERdoctor wordmark logo component used in all headers, 3) Completely redesigned User Dashboard with desktop horizontal step cards grid and mobile vertical accordion with left progress line. All features working. Minor issue: Landing page footer still shows 'GuidedJourney' instead of 'GERdoctor'.
